memory_entries.text: In the product SQLite benchmark, musical instruments are group g3: items_g3 has main_cat='Musical Instruments' for the category; item brand may be absent in items_g3.str_nm and instead stored in attrs_g3 with attr_key='Brand'. For question 'brand associated with the most musical instrument products', join attrs_g3 to items_g3 on ref_id, filter items_g3.main_cat='Musical Instruments' and attrs_g3.attr_key='Brand', count distinct ref_id by attr_val; top observed is Fender with 241.
